final:
module d_flipflop_8bit (
    input wire clk_inv,
    input wire rst_n,
    input wire [7:0] d,
    output reg [7:0] q
);
    always @(posedge clk_inv or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            q <= 8'b00000000;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
